data.content:
Implementation complete

Branch: codex/4b66-stale-beats-overview
Commit: da0b66f7

Changes:
- Fixed src/components/stale-beat-grooming-dialog.tsx by forwarding DialogTrigger asChild props through StaleBeatDialogTrigger into Button, restoring Radix trigger click handling while preserving the extracted trigger component.
- Added src/stories/stale-beat-grooming-dialog.stories.tsx with a browser interaction story that clicks data-testid="stale-beats-dialog-trigger" and asserts data-testid="stale-beat-grooming-dialog" becomes visible.

Validation passed:
- bun run lint
- bunx tsc --noEmit
- bun run test
- bun run test:storybook
- bun run build
